characters.notes: Kira canon confirmed by repo. Prompt pipeline active core (6 prompt IDs). Reference presets valid with 7 scene presets.
Andrey face canon, body canon, expression sheet and 6 solo control tests approved. Prompt pipeline active.

Son-version of ANDREY Senior. Short compact build, about 47 kg, slim youthful physique, fair skin, bright blue eyes, light blonde/dark blonde messy hair, soft oval youthful face, gentle narrow jawline, clean-shaven, natural pinkness in cheeks. Active_version: son_version. Old adult/20+ direction superseded.

Mature adult woman character. Very tall around 187 cm, athletic-curvy build, strong but feminine silhouette, realistic adult proportions, elegant dominant cinematic presence. Base canon and control tests 01-04 approved locally. Prompt pipeline normalized.
